name: BudgetStateStore
description: The complete BUDGET-owned raw-SQLite durability boundary and its exclusions.
schema_def: budget.db under owner-only Tally data root
Tables: budget_plan, budget_plan_revision, budget_plan_entry, budget_lifecycle_event, budget_idempotency_record.
Metadata: PRAGMA user_version with ordered immutable migrations.
Settings: foreign_keys=ON, journal_mode=WAL, synchronous=FULL, bounded busy_timeout.
Write boundary: one BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction for replay reservation, revision/lifecycle mutation, Active constraint, and outcome references.
Protection: directories 0700; database, WAL, SHM, lock, and recognized temporary artifacts 0600 where supported; host-managed encrypted volume required; no custom crypto.

Never persisted: LEDGER transactions/actuals, category catalogue authority, actuals cursor or snapshot, calculated BudgetPosition, analytics/report output, consumer state, serialized request/response bodies.
